plugin.name: Solao_Explorer
plugin.author: Solao
plugin.purpose: Generate mermaid + JSON area maps from the MUSHclient mapper database
plugin.description:
Explorer -- generates map docs from the Aardwolf mapper's own database. The mapper already knows every room it has seen (name, exits, terrain, flags, notes, coords), so Explorer reads that DB directly and emits a mermaid flowchart (a gaardian-style map doc, terrain-coloured, name + room id per node, special exits dotted) plus raw JSON -- for the area you're in, a named area, or all of them.
Reads the mapper DB read-only; it never moves you or changes the map. Needs the GMCP mapper (b6eae87ccedd84f510b74714) installed.
explore show/hide the window explore mermaid mermaid map of the area you're in explore json JSON of the area you're in explore area <name> map a named area (partial name ok) explore all mermaid for every area (many files!) explore list list areas in the mapper DB explore help this

muclient.script:
require "movewindow" require "serialize" require "json" local lsql = rawget(_G, "sqlite3") or require "sqlite3" local GMCP = "3e7dedbe37e44942dd46d264" local MAPPER = "b6eae87ccedd84f510b74714" local win = GetPluginID() local TITLE = "Explorer" local PVER = GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 19) or "?" local cfg local last_msg = "-" local function defaults () return { font = "Lucida Console", size = 9 } end local CARDINAL = { n=1,s=1,e=1,w=1,u=1,d=1,ne=1,nw=1,se=1,sw=1, north=1,south=1,east=1,west=1,up=1,down=1,northeast=1,northwest=1,southeast=1,southwest=1 } local function is_dir (c) return CARDINAL[(c or ""):lower()] ~= nil end local TERRAIN_COLOR = { inside="#8a8a8a", city="#b0b0b0", field="#9acd32", forest="#228b22", hills="#c2b280", mountains="#a0522d", water="#4a90d9", ocean="#1f5f9e", ocean2="#1f5f9e", ocean3="#20507a", underwater="#20507a", air="#cfe8ff", desert="#e0c060", underground="#6b4a2b", cave="#5a4a3a", swamp="#556b2f", jungle="#2e7d32", road="#c9c9a0", beach="#e8d8a0" } local COL = { bg=ColourNameToRGB("#0d1117"), bar=ColourNameToRGB("#161b2e"), btn=ColourNameToRGB("#1b2540"), hover=ColourNameToRGB("#274060"), text=ColourNameToRGB("#e6e6e6"), dim=ColourNameToRGB("#8a93a8"), accent=ColourNameToRGB("#e94560"), ok=ColourNameToRGB("#3ad07a"), border=ColourNameToRGB("#3a4a6b"), } local PAD, ROW_H, MINW = 6, 20, 230 local hovered = nil local L = { width = MINW } ---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- gmcp + db access ---------------------------------------------------------------------- local function gmcp (what) local rc, val = CallPlugin(GMCP, "gmcpdata_as_string", what) if rc ~= 0 then rc, val = CallPlugin(GMCP, "gmcpval", what) end if not val or val == "" then return nil end local ret if not pcall(function() assert(loadstring("ret = "..val))() end) then return nil end return ret end local function db_path () local name = GetPluginVariable(MAPPER, "db_name") if not name or name == "" then name = "Aardwolf" end return GetInfo(66) .. name .. ".db" end -- open the mapper DB read-only, run fn(db), always close. Returns fn's result or nil,err. local function with_db (fn) local db = lsql.open(db_path()) if not db then return nil, "cannot open mapper db" end db:busy_timeout(2000) local ok, res = pcall(fn, db) db:close() if not ok then return nil, tostring(res) end return res end local function query_rows (db, sql, ...) local st = db:prepare(sql) if not st then return {} end if select("#", ...) > 0 then st:bind_values(...) end local rows = {} for r in st:nrows() do rows[#rows+1] = r end st:finalize() return rows end ---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- pull one area's rooms + exits from the mapper DB ---------------------------------------------------------------------- local function area_uid_of_current (db) local num = gmcp("room.info.num") if not num then return nil end local r = query_rows(db, "SELECT area FROM rooms WHERE uid=?", tostring(num)) return r[1] and r[1].area end local function area_uid_by_name (db, name) local r = query_rows(db, "SELECT uid,name FROM areas WHERE name LIKE ? ORDER BY length(name) LIMIT 1", "%"..name.."%") return r[1] and r[1].uid, r[1] and r[1].name end local function area_name (db, uid) local r = query_rows(db, "SELECT name FROM areas WHERE uid=?", uid) return (r[1] and r[1].name) or uid end local function area_map (db, uid) local rooms = query_rows(db, "SELECT uid,name,terrain,info,notes,x,y,z FROM rooms WHERE area=?", uid) local exits = query_rows(db, "SELECT e.fromuid,e.dir,e.touid FROM exits e JOIN rooms r ON e.fromuid=r.uid WHERE r.area=?", uid) return rooms, exits end ---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- generate ---------------------------------------------------------------------- local function esc (s) return tostring(s or ""):gsub('"', "'"):gsub("\n", " ") end local function safe (s) return tostring(s or "area"):gsub("[^%w]+", "_") end local function plugin_dir () return GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 20) end local function build_mermaid (name, rooms, exits) local byid = {} for _, r in ipairs(rooms) do byid[r.uid] = r end local out = { "```mermaid", "flowchart TD" } for _, r in ipairs(rooms) do local lbl = esc(r.name).."
#"..r.uid if r.info and r.info ~= "" then lbl = lbl.."
["..esc(r.info).."]" end -- shop/bank/safe... if r.notes and r.notes ~= "" then lbl = lbl.."
*"..esc(r.notes).."*" end out[#out+1] = " r"..r.uid..'["'..lbl..'"]' end local stub = {} for _, e in ipairs(exits) do if not byid[e.touid] and not stub[e.touid] then stub[e.touid] = true out[#out+1] = " r"..e.touid..'["?
#'..e.touid..'"]' -- exit leaves the area end local arrow = is_dir(e.dir) and " -->|" or " -.->|" -- dotted = special/warp exit out[#out+1] = " r"..e.fromuid..arrow..(tostring(e.dir):gsub("|","/")).."| r"..e.touid end -- terrain colouring local defined = {} for _, r in ipairs(rooms) do local col = r.terrain and TERRAIN_COLOR[tostring(r.terrain):lower()] if col then local cls = "t_"..tostring(r.terrain):gsub("%W","_") if not defined[cls] then defined[cls] = true out[#out+1] = " classDef "..cls.." fill:"..col..",color:#111,stroke:#222" end out[#out+1] = " class r"..r.uid.." "..cls end end out[#out+1] = "```" return "# "..name.."\n\n"..#rooms.." rooms. Solid = direction; dotted = special exit.\n\n"..table.concat(out, "\n").."\n" end local function write_file (path, text) local f = io.open(path, "w") if not f then return false end f:write(text); f:close() return true end local function export (kind, area_uid) -- kind = "mermaid" | "json" local res, err = with_db(function (db) local uid = area_uid or area_uid_of_current(db) if not uid then return "no area (are you in a mapped room?)" end local name = area_name(db, uid) local rooms, exits = area_map(db, uid) if #rooms == 0 then return "mapper has no rooms for "..name end local path, body if kind == "json" then path = plugin_dir().."map_"..safe(name)..".json" body = json.encode({ area = name, uid = uid, rooms = rooms, exits = exits }) else path = plugin_dir().."map_"..safe(name)..".md" body = build_mermaid(name, rooms, exits) end return write_file(path, body) and (kind.." -> map_"..safe(name).."."..(kind=="json" and "json" or "md")) or "write failed" end) last_msg = res or ("db error: "..tostring(err)) ColourNote("cyan","","Explorer: "..last_msg) end local function export_all () local res, err = with_db(function (db) local areas = query_rows(db, "SELECT uid,name FROM areas ORDER BY name") local n = 0 for _, a in ipairs(areas) do local rooms, exits = area_map(db, a.uid) if #rooms > 0 then write_file(plugin_dir().."map_"..safe(a.name)..".md", build_mermaid(a.name, rooms, exits)) n = n + 1 end end return n.." areas exported to the plugin folder" end) last_msg = res or ("db error: "..tostring(err)) ColourNote("cyan","","Explorer: "..last_msg); paint() end local function list_areas (filter) local res = with_db(function (db) local sql = "SELECT a.name, count(r.uid) c FROM areas a LEFT JOIN rooms r ON r.area=a.uid " ..(filter and "WHERE a.name LIKE ? " or "").."GROUP BY a.uid ORDER BY a.name" return filter and query_rows(db, sql, "%"..filter.."%") or query_rows(db, sql) end) if not res then ColourNote("orange","","Explorer: cannot read mapper db"); return end for _, a in ipairs(res) do ColourNote("silver",""," "..a.name.." -- "..a.c.." rooms") end end ---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- window ---------------------------------------------------------------------- local BUTTONS = { { key="mermaid", label="Mermaid map (this area)" }, { key="json", label="JSON (this area)" }, { key="all", label="Export ALL areas" }, { key="list", label="List areas in DB" }, } local function fw (s) return WindowTextWidth(win, "f", s) end local function layout_metrics () L.fh = WindowFontInfo(win, "f", 1) or 12 L.title_h = L.fh + PAD local w = WindowTextWidth(win, "fb", TITLE) + fw(" v"..PVER) for _, b in ipairs(BUTTONS) do w = math.max(w, fw(b.label)) end w = math.max(w, fw("Area: Some Long Area Name Here")) L.width = math.max(MINW, w + PAD*2 + 12) L.rows = {} local y = L.title_h + PAD/2 for _, b in ipairs(BUTTONS) do L.rows[b.key] = y; y = y + ROW_H end L.foot_y = y + PAD/2 L.height = L.foot_y + (L.fh * 2) + PAD end function paint () if not L.rows then return end WindowRectOp(win, 2, 0, 0, 0, 0, COL.bg) WindowRectOp(win, 2, 0, 0, L.width, L.title_h, COL.bar) WindowText(win, "fb", TITLE, PAD, PAD/2, 0, 0, COL.accent) WindowText(win, "f", " v"..PVER, PAD + WindowTextWidth(win,"fb",TITLE), PAD/2, 0, 0, COL.dim) for _, b in ipairs(BUTTONS) do local y = L.rows[b.key] local bg = (hovered == "ex_"..b.key) and COL.hover or COL.btn WindowRectOp(win, 2, PAD, y, L.width-PAD, y+ROW_H-3, bg) WindowRectOp(win, 1, PAD, y, L.width-PAD, y+ROW_H-3, COL.border) WindowText(win, "f", b.label, PAD+5, y+3, 0, 0, COL.text) end local y = L.foot_y WindowText(win, "f", "Area: ", PAD, y, 0, 0, COL.dim) WindowText(win, "fb", gmcp("room.info.zone") or "-", PAD + fw("Area: "), y, 0, 0, COL.ok) WindowText(win, "f", last_msg, PAD, y + L.fh + 1, 0, 0, COL.dim) WindowRectOp(win, 1, 0, 0, L.width-1, L.height-1, COL.border) WindowShow(win, true) pcall(CallPlugin, "abc1a0944ae4af7586ce88dc", "BufferedRepaint") end local function click_button (key) if key == "mermaid" then export("mermaid") elseif key == "json" then export("json") elseif key == "all" then export_all() elseif key == "list" then list_areas() end paint() end local function rebuild () layout_metrics() WindowResize(win, L.width, L.height, COL.bg) WindowDeleteAllHotspots(win) for _, b in ipairs(BUTTONS) do local y = L.rows[b.key] WindowAddHotspot(win, "ex_"..b.key, PAD, y, L.width-PAD, y+ROW_H-3, "ex_over", "ex_out", "", "", "ex_click", b.label, miniwin.cursor_hand, 0) end movewindow.add_drag_handler(win, 0, 0, L.width, L.title_h) paint() end function ex_click (flags, id) click_button(id:gsub("^ex_", "")) end function ex_over (flags, id) if hovered ~= id then hovered = id; paint() end end function ex_out (flags, id) if hovered == id then hovered = nil; paint() end end function ex_titlebar (flags, id) if bit.band(flags, miniwin.hotspot_got_rh_mouse) ~= 0 then if WindowMenu(win, WindowInfo(win,14), WindowInfo(win,15), "Hide") == "Hide" then WindowShow(win, false) end end end function OnPluginBroadcast (msg, id, name, text) if id == GMCP and text == "room.info" then paint() end end ---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- command ---------------------------------------------------------------------- local function help () ColourNote("cyan","","Explorer v"..PVER.." -- map docs from the mapper database") ColourNote("yellow","","explore mermaid | json the area you're in") ColourNote("yellow","","explore area a named area (partial ok)") ColourNote("yellow","","explore all every area (many files)") ColourNote("yellow","","explore list [filter] areas in the DB") end function ex_cmd (name, line, wildcards) local arg = Trim(wildcards[1] or "") local verb, rest = arg:match("^(%S*)%s*(.*)$") verb = verb:lower() if arg == "" then if WindowInfo(win, 5) then WindowShow(win, false) else WindowShow(win, true); paint() end elseif verb == "help" or verb == "?" then help() elseif verb == "mermaid" then export("mermaid") elseif verb == "json" then export("json") elseif verb == "all" then export_all() elseif verb == "list" then list_areas(rest ~= "" and rest or nil) elseif verb == "area" then if rest == "" then ColourNote("orange","","Usage: explore area "); return end local res, err = with_db(function (db) local uid, nm = area_uid_by_name(db, rest) if not uid then return "no area matching '"..rest.."'" end return { uid = uid, name = nm } end) if type(res) == "table" then export("mermaid", res.uid) else ColourNote("orange","","Explorer: "..tostring(res or err)) end else ColourNote("orange","","Explorer: unknown '"..verb.."'. Try 'explore help'.") end end ---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- lifecycle ---------------------------------------------------------------------- function OnPluginInstall () cfg = defaults() local blob = GetVariable("cfg") if blob then local ok = pcall(function() assert(loadstring(blob))() end) if ok and saved then for k, v in pairs(saved) do cfg[k] = v end end end windowinfo = movewindow.install(win, miniwin.pos_top_right, miniwin.create_absolute_location, false, nil, { mouseup = ex_titlebar }, { x = 10, y = 500 }) WindowCreate(win, windowinfo.window_left, windowinfo.window_top, MINW, 40, windowinfo.window_mode, windowinfo.window_flags, COL.bg) WindowFont(win, "f", cfg.font, cfg.size, false, false, false, false, 0) WindowFont(win, "fb", cfg.font, cfg.size, true, false, false, false, 0) rebuild() WindowShow(win, true) end function OnPluginSaveState () SetVariable("cfg", "saved = "..serialize.save_simple(cfg)) if WindowInfo(win, 1) then movewindow.save_state(win) end end function OnPluginClose () WindowShow(win, false); WindowDelete(win) end
